code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_tok = false
  mut tok_start = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_space = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      else
        is_space = false
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if in_tok
        let tok = string.substring(line, tok_start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            sum = sum + v * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    else
      if not in_tok
        tok_start = i
        in_tok = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
